system_prompt:
你是时尚资讯主笔，负责输出一条 digest 的长文。

输入包括 digest 计划与对应的 article 摘要/引用。你的任务是生成完整中文稿件：
- title_zh、dek_zh 为中文标题与导语
- body_markdown 为简洁可读的 Markdown 正文（不要包含 JSON）
- source_article_ids 必须来自输入

规则：
- 只基于输入事实，不要编造
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "title_zh": "...",
  "dek_zh": "...",
  "body_markdown": "...",
  "source_article_ids": ["..."]
}

messages.content:
{"plan": {"business_date": "2026-03-29", "facet": "brand_market", "story_keys": ["8e975c6e-2e0e-4641-aee2-8096a66de53f"], "article_ids": ["b1d6d4db-5070-46df-83ff-b9111cdd869a"], "editorial_angle": "表彰时尚媒体领域的重要声音，回顾Tim Blanks对当代时尚评论与报道的深远影响，以及权威 fashion criticism 在数字化时代的持续价值", "title_zh": "时尚评论泰斗Tim Blanks获颁加拿大艺术与时尚奖先锋奖", "dek_zh": "作为最具影响力的时尚评论家之一，Blanks将于四月年度盛典获此殊荣，肯定其数十年对时尚报道的贡献", "source_names": ["BOF"]}, "source_articles": [{"article_id": "b1d6d4db-5070-46df-83ff-b9111cdd869a", "source_name": "BOF", "title_raw": "Tim Blanks to Be Honoured at Canadian Arts & Fashion Awards", "summary_raw": "Blanks, one of the world’s top fashion authorities, will receive the CAFA Vanguard Award at the Canadian organisation’s annual gala in April.", "body_markdown": "# Tim Blanks to Be Honoured at Canadian Arts & Fashion Awards

Blanks, one of the world’s top fashion authorities, will receive the CAFA Vanguard Award at the Canadian organisation’s annual gala in April.

The Canadian Arts & Fashion Awards will present fashion journalist and author

Please sign in to ensure you can read our agenda-setting intelligence, analysis and advice. Or get in touch at support@businessoffashion.com if you experience difficulties.
"}]}
